description: Use this API to change the identifier of the specified inter-area transfer. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbidatrn(frmarea, toarea, id, idnew)

parameters.name: frmarea
parameters.description: One of the areas involved in the transfer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: toarea
parameters.description: Other area involved in the transfer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Present inter-area transfer identifier. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New identifier to be assigned to the inter-area transfer. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: inter-area transfer ID from area FRMAREA to TOAREA not found.
inter-area transfer ID from area FRMAREA to TOAREA already exists.
invalid new identifier–must be 0 through 9 or A through Z.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
